"Create a product" : $parameter.operation === "createVariant" ? "Create a variant" : $parameter.operation === "updateProduct" ? "Update a product" : $parameter.operation === "updateVariant" ? "Update a variant" : $parameter.operation === "deleteProduct" ? "Delete a product" : $parameter.operation === "deleteVariant" ? "Delete a variant" : $parameter.operation) : $parameter.resource === "additionalActions" ? ($parameter.operation === "getRecommendations" ? "Get AI product recommendations" : $parameter.operation === "getLocations" ? "Get inventory locations" : $parameter.operation === "createDiscount" ? "Create a discount" : $parameter.operation) : $parameter.operation }}
